---
description: Refactor existing code to reduce complexity and improve maintainability.
---

Help me simplify an existing implementation using the workflow in `.github/skills/simplify-implementation/SKILL.md`.

Read the skill first, then follow its phases: Gather Context → Analyze Complexity → Propose Simplifications → Prioritize & Plan → Validate (explicitly applying the `security` and `performance` skills during validation).

Do not modify code until I approve the simplification plan.

After applying refactors, output a **What changed** section with at least 3 bullets covering: what was restructured and in which file/function, why the old approach was problematic, and what I should internalize about the new pattern so I can apply it independently.

When done, satisfy **`simplify-implementation`** **session closure** (Atomic Instinct or `Lesson: N/A`), then suggest `/verify` and `/write-tests` as next steps.
